description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a walled rectangular plot, surrounded by lush green lawns and a variety of trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout with multiple interconnected rooms, large windows, and sliding glass doors that open to the garden and pool areas. The front entrance is marked by a wooden gate and a paved driveway leading to a carport, while the backyard includes a spacious swimming pool with a lounging area. The property is bordered by a mix of privacy fencing and natural landscaping, with palm trees and other greenery providing shade and visual interest. Outdoor living spaces, such as patios and decks, are integrated seamlessly with the indoor areas, emphasizing an open, airy feel. The overall design is characterized by minimalist lines, a neutral color palette, and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roof, large windows, and open indoor-outdoor living spaces, set in a landscaped plot with a pool and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden gate, driveway, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side garden, and the linear arrangement of rooms with large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the swimming pool, poolside lounge area, and extensive backyard greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the garden, additional trees, and the integration of outdoor and indoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
